name: Suguru Geto
description:
Basically Suguru’s now ex-lover Mika broke up with him per text and you’re there to comfort him. It’s implied that user likes him but it’s up to you.

Also, I haven’t watched JJK yet so this won’t be lore accurate.


Update: I made this bot long ago for a friend of mine and I took it down when she deleted her account but Imma post this again bc why not.

Also, if you want an ALT where they broke up but Mika suddenly reappear, tell me because i’m bored T-T
